unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: How do we compare with each other?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：com(共同)+pare(看作pair一双)→把两个东西放到一双眼睛前共同看→“比较;对比”

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Match each word with its opposite. fast shy late tall lazy loud funny
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：sh(沙发)+y(像树丫)→害羞得躲在沙发后面像个小树丫→“害羞的”

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Match each word with its opposite. fast shy late tall lazy loud funny
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：la(拉)+zy(自愿)→拉他都不自愿动弹→“懒惰的”

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adv. 响亮地 adj.大声的
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Match each word with its opposite. fast shy late tall lazy loud funny
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：l(楼)+oud(out出去)→在楼里大声叫喊声音传到外面去→“大声的”

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: outgoing boring short quiet early slow hard-working
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：out(外面)+going(走出的)→总是喜欢走到外面和人交往→“外向的”

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: outgoing boring short quiet early slow hard-working
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：hard(努力地)+working(工作学习)→努力地工作和学习→“勤奋的”

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Why don't you perform?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：per(每个)+form(表格/形式)→每一种形式都要上台展示一下→“表演”

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Well, I'm afraid of performing alone.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：a(一个)+lone(看作long长)→一个人孤零零地面对长路→“独自”

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Chen Jie is afraid of performing alone so they solve the problem by playing a song together.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：s(死/难)+olve(看作love爱)→用爱去感化死对头，从而“解决”了问题

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: You play the Chinese flute better than anyone else in our music club.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：f(飞)+lute(看作lute琵琶，乐器)→吹奏这个乐器时，声音好听得让人飞起→“长笛”

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Congratulations on winning the prize at the school music festival!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：con(共同)+grat(感激/开心)+ulation(名词后缀)→大家聚在一起表达开心→“祝贺”

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Congratulations on winning the prize at the school music festival!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：pr(仆人)+ize(看作ice冰)→仆人把冰雕刻得很好，得到了国王的“奖励”

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: You attended the festival last year and this year.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：at(在)+tend(照料/倾向)→人到了现场去照料和关注→“参加;出席”

unit_vocabulary.meaning: prep.除……之外(还) adv. 而且
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Besides singing, how do you spend your spare time?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：beside(在……旁边)+s(复数/多一个)→在旁边还多出了一个→“除……之外(还)”

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adj.空闲的;备用的 v. 抽出;拨出
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Besides singing, how do you spend your spare time?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：s(死)+pare(削/剥离)→把死板的时间剥离出一部分来，作为“空闲的”时间

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Our pleasure!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：pleas(看作please请/使高兴)+ure(名词后缀)→让人感到高兴的事情→“乐事;愉快”

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Appearance Personality Habit Strength
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：appear(出现)+ance(名词后缀)→人一出现时给人的第一感觉→“外表”

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Appearance Personality Habit Strength
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：person(人)+ality(复合名词后缀)→一个人特有的核心特质→“性格”

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Appearance Personality Habit Strength
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：se(看作see)+ri(日/天)+ous(多……的)→每天看起来都在盯着你、有很多话想说，表情很“严肃的”

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Appearance Personality Habit Strength
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：st(身体)+rength(看作length长度)→身体能延展的最长程度反映出你的“力量”和“优势”

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Is Julie slimmer than you ?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：s(林)+lim(看作limb树枝/四肢)→身头像森林里的树枝一样修长→“苗条的”

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Facts Guangzhou Vancouver
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：fa(发)+ct(餐厅)→发现在餐厅里吃饭是一个不可改变的“事实”

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Population (2024) 18.978 million 0.76 million
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：popul(看作people人)+ation(名词后缀)→一个地区所有人的总和→“人口”

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Area 7,436 square km 115 square km
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 缩写记忆：k代表kilo(千)，m代表metre(米)，合起来就是“千米”

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adj.平均的;平常的 n. 平均数
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Average rainfall per year 1,923 mm 1,475 mm
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：av(阿凡)+er(耳)+age(年龄)→阿凡提耳朵的年龄刚好代表了当时当地的“平均”年龄

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Average rainfall per year 1,923 mm 1,475 mm
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 组合词记忆：rain(雨)+fall(落下)→落下来的雨的量→“降雨量”

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Average rainfall per year 1,923 mm 1,475 mm
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：p(大棚)+er(耳)→每个大棚里都要配一个大耳朵来听动静→“每”

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Average rainfall per year 1,923 mm 1,475 mm
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 缩写记忆：m代表milli(毫)，m代表metre(米)，合起来就是“毫米”

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Guangzhou has a pleasant temperature in January.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：pleas(看作please使高兴)+ant(形容词后缀)→能让人心情变得十分高兴的→“宜人的”

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: How do we understand differences?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：differ(不同)+ence(名词后缀)→不同之处→“差异”

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adj. 相像的 adv. 相似地
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Some people think that friends should be alike, but some other people think that friends should be different.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：a(一个)+like(像)→长得或者行为表现成像一个样子→“相像的”

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I think a good friend is like a mirror.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：mi(米)+rr(双胞胎)+or(人)→吃米饭的一对双胞胎对着瞧，中间隔着一面“镜子”

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 业余爱好;兴趣 v. 使感兴趣
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We often hang out together because we have similar hobbies and interests.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：inter(在……之间)+est(最高级后缀)→在所有的事物中，最能吸引你的东西→“兴趣”

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I read more history books than he does, and he reads a lot of novels.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：no(不)+vel(看作well好)→故事里的人过得不好，跌宕起伏的才是“小说”

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n.理解力;感觉 v. 意识到
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: She has a great sense of humour too.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：se(看作see)+nse(看作nose)→通过眼睛和鼻子去捕捉外界的信息→“感觉”

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: She has a great sense of humour too.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆：“幽默”就是humour的音译

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: He is not afraid to give his opinion, especially when he thinks I am making a mistake.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：o(圆圈)+pin(大头针)+ion(名词后缀)→把大头针扎在圆圈里的哪个位置，代表了你的“看法”

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adj. & adv. 较少的;更少的 pron. 较少
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I am less straightforward than he is, but I am glad to have an honest friend.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：le(乐)+ss(两条蛇)→两条蛇在享乐，数量变得“更少的”

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I am less straightforward than he is, but I am glad to have an honest friend.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 组合词记忆：straight(笔直的)+forward(向前)→说话直接往前冲、不绕弯子→“坦率的”

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I am less straightforward than he is, but I am glad to have an honest friend.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：hon(红/一颗红心)+est(最)→有着一颗最红、最纯洁的心→“诚实的”

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: gives direct opinions
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：di(低)+rect(正确/直线)→低头直接走直线最省事→“直接的”

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: What can similarities bring to a friendship?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：similar(相似的)+ity(名词后缀)→“相似之处”

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: What can similarities bring to a friendship?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 组合词记忆：friend(朋友)+ship(名词后缀，表示一种状态或关系)→朋友之间的情感状态→“友谊”

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The average height of the students in the class is around 1.6 metres.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：me(我)+tre(看作tree树)→我和一棵小树一样高，刚好是一“米”

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The prince, Edward, and the poor boy, Tom, are the two characters in Mark Twain's famous novel
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：p(漂亮)+rice(大米)→吃了漂亮大米长大的高贵男孩→“王子”

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The prince, Edward, and the poor boy, Tom, are the two characters in Mark Twain's famous novel
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：cha(茶)+rac(跑/快)+ter(特)→喝完茶后跑得特别快的书本戏剧里的“人物”

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The Prince and the Pauper.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：pau(跑)+per(每)→每天到处跑着跟人讨饭的人→“贫民;乞丐”

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: They exchanged their lives by accident.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 组合词记忆：ex(出来)+change(改变)→把东西拿出来做出改变，就是去和别人“交换”

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: They exchanged their lives by accident.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：ac(一再)+ci(看作cry哭)+dent(凹痕)→车子一再撞出凹痕让人大哭，因为发生了“事故”

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Besides this, he also realized that people's lives were much harder than he expected.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：ex(向外)+spect(看)→眼睛一直向外看，等待事情发生→“期待”

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: She helps me see the silver lining in difficult situations.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：sil(看作silk丝绸)+ver(看作very非常)→这种丝绸非常昂贵，在阳光下闪着“银色的”光芒

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: She helps me see the silver lining in difficult situations.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：line(线/线条)+ing(名词后缀)→衣服里面排成线的布料结构→“内衬”

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: She helps me see the silver lining in difficult situations.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：sit(坐)+uation(名词后缀)→你现在坐在哪里、处于什么境地→“情况;状况”

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: "A true friend reaches for your hand and touches your heart."
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：to(去)+u(你)+ch(吃)→用手去拿给你吃，手会产生“触碰”

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Chen Jie is afraid of performing alone so they solve the problem by playing a song together.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 组合记忆：performing(表演)+alone(独自地)→不带其他人“独自表演”

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We often hang out together because we have similar hobbies and interests.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：hang(挂)+out(在外面)→把自己像件衣服一样挂在街上晃荡→“闲逛”

unit_vocabulary.comparison: sense of humour vs sense of duty
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: She has a great sense of humour too.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 组合记忆：sense(感觉/能力)+of(的)+humour(幽默)→体会到快乐并让人发笑的能力→“幽默感”

unit_vocabulary.meaning: 短语. 归功于;由于;因为
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Thanks to her, I am becoming more outgoing.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 组合记忆：把多谢的意愿送给某人，多亏了某人→“归功于”

unit_vocabulary.comparison: make a mistake vs make a decision
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: especially when he thinks I am making a mistake.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 组合记忆：make(制造)+mistake(错误)→在做事情的过程中“犯错误”

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: They exchanged their lives by accident.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 组合记忆：by(通过)+accident(意外事故)→由于一件没有预料到的事引起的→“偶然”

unit_vocabulary.meaning: 短语. 一线光明;困境中的一丝希望
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: She helps me see the silver lining in difficult situations.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 文化背景记忆：源自西方谚语“每朵乌云背后都有银边”，引申为“一线光明”

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I know she cares about me because she's always there to listen.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 组合记忆：care(在意)+about(关于)→心思全部都放在关于对方的事情上→“关心”

unit_vocabulary.meaning: 短语. 伸手触碰;伸手去拿
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: "A true friend reaches for your hand and touches your heart."
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 组合记忆：reach(伸出手臂)+for(为了某一目标)→把手伸出去找某个目标→“伸手触碰”

unit_vocabulary.comparison: lend sb a hand vs give up
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We are always ready to help each other by lending a hand.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 组合记忆：lend(借出)+hand(手)→把自己的手借给需要的人搭一把力→“帮助”
